Said Jesus to the unseeing: "For had ye believed Moses, ye would have believed me: for he wrote of me. "But if ye believe not his writings, how shall ye believe my words?" (John 5:46-47). Those who understood and believed not that which Moses wrote did not, in effect, believe this which Jesus spoke.
